name: CROSS_PATENT_COUNT_BY_TARGET_YEAR_RANGE
description: Patent count by target in a year range.
cypher:
MATCH (t:Target {symbol:$target})<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year >= $start_year AND y.year <= $end_year
RETURN t.symbol AS target, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
LIMIT 1;

examples: 某靶点在2023-2025的专利数量是多少？
